title: ligularia mortonii
intro: Ligularia mortonii, also known as Morton's ligularia, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ligularia mortonii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
